label: Assembly Preview — v0.1 Unified Body
description: Full v0.1 unified body with lean angle, shell geometry, and internal mechanism preview. Default view.

label: Base Shell
description: 80×60×30mm base shell with internal cam cavity and weight chamber. Wall thickness 2.5mm.

label: Torso Shell
description: 24×24×50mm torso shell with follower guide and maintenance panel slot. Wall thickness 2.0mm.

label: Head Shell
description: Ø20×25mm faceless ellipsoid head shell. Wall thickness 1.5mm. Neck interface Ø4.5mm.

label: Neck Sleeve
description: Ø6×12mm neck sleeve with flanges. Internal bore Ø4.3mm for stainless steel shaft.

label: Partition
description: Cam cavity / weight chamber divider plate. M3 screw mount.

label: Access Panel
description: Removable bottom access panel for weight chamber. M3 screw + rubber pad slot.

label: Breathing Cam
description: Eccentric disc cam. Ø25mm total, 5mm lift, 5mm thickness. Core of the breathing mechanism.

label: Follower
description: Flat-bottom follower with guide slider. Ø12mm base, 20mm guide height.

label: Crank
description: L-shaped hand crank with spherical grip. 30mm arm length.
